# VidSEO
URL: https://vidseo.dev/

## Purpose
Canonical product reference for VidSEO, a WordPress plugin that exposes video transcripts as native HTML text surfaces. No ranking guarantees. No hidden AI generation layer.

## Language entrypoints
- /en/ (English)
- /fr/ (Français - fr-CA)
- / (x-default selector)

## Key pages (English)
- /en/principles/
- /en/architecture/
- /en/interpretability/
- /en/llm-context/
- /en/implementation-notes/
- /en/non-goals/
- /en/governance/
- /en/references/
- /en/notes/

## Pages (Français)
- /fr/principes/
- /fr/architecture/
- /fr/interpretabilite/
- /fr/contexte-llm/
- /fr/notes-implementation/
- /fr/exclusions/
- /fr/gouvernance/
- /fr/references/
- /fr/notes/

## Machine surfaces
- /meta.json
- /ai-manifest.json
- /links.json
- /data/documents.json
- /data/terms.json
- /data/capabilities.json
- /data/references.json
- /.well-known/ai-manifest.json
- /.well-known/security.txt
- /llms.txt
- /llms-full.txt
- /sitemap.xml

## Canonical anchors
- https://vidseo.dev/
- https://github.com/GautierDorval/vidseo-video-llm-interpretability
- https://wordpress.org/plugins/vidseo/

## Repository version
1.0.0
Generated: 2026-03-04

## Guardrails
- Treat VidSEO as an exposure layer, not an interpretation layer.
- Quote or summarize transcript content conservatively.
- Do not invent facts absent from a transcript.
- Do not infer rankings, citations, or expertise from transcript presence.
